title: Make Uncrafting Table Mineable
description: This is a simple Data Pack that makes the Simple Uncrafting Table by pitan76 mineable with an axe, just like the regular Crafting Table.
body:
This Data Pack adds the tag minecraft:mineable/axe to uncraftingtable76:uncraftingtable. This makes the Simple Uncrafting Table by pitan76 mineable with an axe.

Original Mod:
https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-uncrafting-table
